commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a targeted SDK deprecation rule pack and static inspection/report plumbing for file-backed session/transcript SDK identity usage.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding at source level: the new regexes are applied to plugin source text and CodeQL reported polynomial behavior. I did not run an exploit-style timing reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor proof plus maintainer review of the rule set and the CodeQL-backed scanner repair, so it is not a safe automated repair lane.
